select_model.title: Select Model
select_model.description: Found {model_count} models on {base_url}. Select the model to use for conversations.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to Ollama. Please make sure Ollama is running and accessible.

data.name: Name
data.max_tokens: Max tokens to return in response
data.context_truncate_strategy: Context truncation strategy when exceeded threshold

data_description.num_ctx: The context window size for the model. Higher values allow for longer conversations but use more memory.
data_description.shorten_tool_call_id: Shorten tool call IDs for compatibility with some Ollama models.

data_description.num_ctx: The context window size for the model.

query_image.name: Query image
query_image.description: Take in images and answer questions about them using vision-capable Ollama models

config_entry.name: Config Entry
config_entry.description: The config entry to use for this service

prompt.name: Prompt
prompt.description: The text to ask about image

images.name: Images
images.description: A list of images that would be asked

change_config.name: Change configuration
change_config.description: Changes the configuration of the integration.

download_skill.name: Download skill
download_skill.description: Download a skill from the GitHub repository to your skills directory.

skill_name.name: Skill name
skill_name.description: The name of the skill to download (e.g., crypto)

reload_skills.name: Reload skills
reload_skills.description: Reload skills from the skills directory.

analyze_image.name: Analyze image
analyze_image.description: Analyze an image and provide detailed description using Ollama vision models

config_entry.name: Config Entry
config_entry.description: The config entry to use for this service

image_url.name: Image URL
image_url.description: URL of the image to analyze

prompt.name: Prompt
prompt.description: Optional prompt to guide the analysis
prompt.example: Please describe this image in detail.

model.name: Model
model.description: The vision model to use for analysis

scan_home_automation_patterns.name: Scan home automation patterns
scan_home_automation_patterns.description: Trigger an automated scan of Home Assistant history data to analyze usage patterns and generate automation recommendations

config_entry.name: Config Entry
config_entry.description: Config entry ID for the Oasira AI Conversation integration

time_range_days.name: Time Range (Days)
time_range_days.description: Number of days to analyze (1-90). Higher values provide more data but may take longer to process.

entity_types.name: Entity Types
entity_types.description: Types of entities to analyze. Leave empty to analyze all exposed entity types.

include_entities.name: Include Entities
include_entities.description: Specific entity IDs to include in analysis. Leave empty to include all entities of the selected types.

exclude_entities.name: Exclude Entities
exclude_entities.description: Specific entity IDs to exclude from analysis.

pattern_types.name: Pattern Types
pattern_types.description: Types of patterns to detect. Leave empty to detect all pattern types.

min_confidence.name: Min Confidence
min_confidence.description: Minimum confidence threshold for pattern detection (0.0-1.0)

time_window_minutes.name: Time Window (Minutes)
time_window_minutes.description: Time window in minutes for grouping similar events

save_results.name: Save Results
save_results.description: Whether to save the analysis results to a file

results_file.name: Results File
results_file.description: File path to save results (relative to config directory)
